wine_bars_late.name: Le Wine Bar by Le Vintage
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Around 500 references of wine, Champagne and spirits, with a strong line in grower and biodynamic Champagne alongside the big houses
wine_bars_late.tip: Brothers Nicolas and Pierre-Louis Papavero lean into grower fizz; ask them to open a biodynamic Champagne by the glass.
wine_bars_late.description: Family-run wine bar on the Place du Forum with a deep grower-Champagne list and a late, convivial room. A Reims institution for terroir-driven bubbles.

wine_bars_late.name: La Vinocave
wine_bars_late.wine_program: A wide selection of small-domaine Champagnes and still wines for tasting on site and to take away, running since 1985
wine_bars_late.tip: Long-running cave a manger; the team pairs small-grower Champagnes with cheese and charcuterie into the evening.
wine_bars_late.description: Wine shop and tasting bar open since 1985, pouring small-domaine Champagnes with food into the evening near the Reims centre.

wine_bars_late.name: Le Bocal
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Compact list of Champagne and white wine built to match the seafood, with grower bubbles by the glass
wine_bars_late.tip: Behind a fishmonger near the Halles du Boulingrin; the oyster-and-Champagne pairing is the order to make.
wine_bars_late.description: Tiny seafood spot behind a fishmonger near the Boulingrin market, pairing oysters and shellfish with Champagne by the glass.

wine_bars_late.name: La Cave a Champagne
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Champagne-focused list spanning growers and houses, poured by the glass alongside a traditional Champenois menu
wine_bars_late.tip: A reliable Epernay table for Champagne by the glass with regional cooking; sit late after the avenue houses close.
wine_bars_late.description: Traditional Epernay restaurant and Champagne bar on Rue Gambetta, pouring growers and houses by the glass into the evening.

wine_bars_late.name: Le Bistrot du Forum
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Bistro wine list with Champagne by the glass alongside French regional bottles, a relaxed evening room on the Forum
wine_bars_late.tip: A low-key Forum bistro for a glass of Champagne with classic French plates away from the tourist crush.
wine_bars_late.description: Neighbourhood bistro on the Place du Forum in Reims pouring Champagne by the glass with regional cooking into the evening.

listening_bars.name: The Glue Pot
listening_bars.wine_program: Pub and late bar with Champagne by the glass alongside beer and spirits, with a resident DJ on weekend nights
listening_bars.tip: Open to 2am with a resident DJ Thursday to Saturday; the late spot to keep a Champagne night going on Drouet d'Erlon.
listening_bars.description: Long-running late bar on Place Drouet d'Erlon with a weekend DJ, pouring Champagne among the pints into the small hours.

listening_bars.name: Latino Cafe
listening_bars.wine_program: Brasserie and music bar with Champagne and cocktails, live music and a club room on weekend nights
listening_bars.tip: Music club and brasserie in one; a Champagne flute before the dance floor on a Reims weekend.
listening_bars.description: Brasserie and music club on Place Drouet d'Erlon mixing Champagne and cocktails with live sets and a late dance room.

candle_lit.name: Le Parvis
candle_lit.wine_program: Exclusive Champagne list poured by the glass with truffle, caviar and fine produce, facing the cathedral
candle_lit.tip: Sit on the terrace facing the illuminated cathedral at night with a glass of prestige Champagne and truffle plates.
candle_lit.description: Intimate Champagne bar and fine grocer opposite Reims Cathedral, pouring exclusive cuvees with truffle and caviar by candlelight.

candle_lit.name: Brasserie Excelsior
candle_lit.wine_program: Classic brasserie Champagne and wine list to match seafood platters, served late into the evening
candle_lit.tip: A grand Belle Epoque brasserie room; order a seafood platter with Champagne for a late, warmly lit dinner.
candle_lit.description: Belle Epoque brasserie on Drouet d'Erlon serving seafood and Champagne late in a warmly lit, classic dining room.

candle_lit.name: Les Berceaux
candle_lit.wine_program: Hotel restaurant and wine bar with a deep Champagne cellar poured by the glass in an intimate evening dining room
candle_lit.tip: A few minutes from the Avenue de Champagne; the candlelit dining room is a calm spot for a serious Champagne list.
candle_lit.description: Long-running Epernay hotel restaurant and wine bar minutes from the avenue, with a deep Champagne cellar in an intimate evening room.

lounges.name: L'Apostrophe
lounges.wine_program: Gastronomic brasserie and cocktail lounge with Champagne by the glass and large shared serves on the terrace
lounges.tip: Order a glass of Champagne on the terrace and watch the Drouet d'Erlon promenade; the kitchen runs late.
lounges.description: Gastronomic brasserie and lounge on Place Drouet d'Erlon with Champagne and cocktails and a busy terrace that runs late.

lounges.name: Sacre Bistro
lounges.wine_program: Bistro with a Champagne-leaning list poured by the glass, a relaxed evening room near the Avenue de Champagne
lounges.tip: A short walk off the Avenue de Champagne; a relaxed evening glass of grower Champagne with bistro plates.
lounges.description: Modern bistro on Place Auban-Moet in Epernay pouring Champagne by the glass in a relaxed evening room near the avenue.

fortified_specialists.name: Distillerie Jean Goyard
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Tastings of the three Champenois spirits, Ratafia Champenois, Fine de Champagne and Marc de Champagne, at the oldest working distillery in the region
fortified_specialists.tip: Take the guided distillery tour at Ay and finish with the commented tasting of Ratafia, Fine and Marc, the Champagne digestifs.
fortified_specialists.description: The oldest working distillery in Champagne, at Ay, where Ratafia, Fine and Marc de Champagne are made and tasted in the boutique.

fortified_specialists.name: Le Parvis Ratafia and digestif corner
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Champagne bar that also pours regional digestifs, Ratafia Champenois and Marc de Champagne, to close an evening by the cathedral
fortified_specialists.tip: After the Champagne flight, ask for a glass of Ratafia Champenois as a sweet regional nightcap.
fortified_specialists.description: The cathedral-facing Champagne bar Le Parvis also pours Ratafia and Marc de Champagne, a place to close the night on a regional digestif.

late_tastings.name: C Comme Champagne
late_tastings.wine_program: Tasting bar and shop pouring more than 300 grower Champagnes from small independent producers, flights and by the glass
late_tastings.tip: Order the discovery flight of grower Champagnes; the cellar staff steer you to small estates you will not find at the big houses.
late_tastings.description: Epernay tasting bar and shop devoted to small independent growers, with discovery flights and dozens of Champagnes by the glass into the evening.

late_tastings.name: Tresors de Champagne, La Boutique
late_tastings.wine_program: Tasting bar pouring more than 200 Champagnes from 26 independent grower members of the Club Tresors de Champagne
late_tastings.tip: Behind the Halles du Boulingrin; taste across the Club Tresors growers to compare special-club cuvees side by side.
late_tastings.description: The Club Tresors de Champagne boutique and tasting bar near the Boulingrin, pouring 200-plus cuvees from its independent grower members.

late_tastings.name: Le 25bis by Leclerc Briant
late_tastings.wine_program: Champagne bar and boutique on the Avenue de Champagne pouring the full biodynamic Leclerc Briant range by the glass
late_tastings.tip: Taste the biodynamic Leclerc Briant range on the famous avenue, then linger on the garden terrace as the houses light up.
late_tastings.description: Champagne bar, boutique and guest house on the Avenue de Champagne pouring the biodynamic Leclerc Briant range into the evening.

sparkling_rooms.name: Le Cellier by Perrier-Jouet
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: House Champagne bar pouring the Perrier-Jouet range including Belle Epoque, by the glass and in flights on the avenue
sparkling_rooms.tip: Book the Belle Epoque flight to taste the floral Perrier-Jouet prestige cuvee in the house's own bar on the avenue.
sparkling_rooms.description: Perrier-Jouet's Champagne bar and restaurant on the Avenue de Champagne, pouring the house range up to the Belle Epoque prestige cuvee.

sparkling_rooms.name: La Cave de l'Avenue
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Champagne bar and shop of the Champagne A. Bergere house, pouring growers and houses by the glass on the avenue
sparkling_rooms.tip: Right at the foot of the Avenue de Champagne; a relaxed first or last glass before walking the great houses.
sparkling_rooms.description: Champagne bar and boutique at the entrance to the Avenue de Champagne, pouring a mix of growers and houses by the glass.

sparkling_rooms.name: Club Tresors de Champagne tasting room
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Champagne-only tasting room pouring special-club cuvees from 26 independent grower houses, flights and glasses
sparkling_rooms.tip: This is a Champagne-only room; build a flight across the grower members to compare special-club cuvees in one sitting.
sparkling_rooms.description: A Champagne-only tasting room near the Boulingrin pouring the special-club cuvees of the Club Tresors grower members.

sparkling_rooms.name: C Comme grower sparkling room
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Champagne-only bar and cellar pouring 300-plus grower cuvees, organised by discovery flights of small independent estates
sparkling_rooms.tip: Descend to the cellar room and let staff build a grower-only flight; nothing here is poured but Champagne.
sparkling_rooms.description: Epernay's dedicated grower-Champagne room, pouring hundreds of small-estate cuvees in flights with nothing on the list but bubbles.

sparkling_rooms.name: Le Wine Bar grower-Champagne room
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Champagne-forward bar with a large grower and biodynamic fizz selection by the glass, open late on the Place du Forum
sparkling_rooms.tip: Ask for a flight of biodynamic grower Champagnes; the Papavero brothers keep a deep small-estate selection open by the glass.
sparkling_rooms.description: The grower-Champagne heart of Le Wine Bar by Le Vintage, pouring biodynamic and small-estate fizz by the glass late on the Place du Forum.

sparkling_rooms.name: Le 25bis Leclerc Briant sparkling room
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Champagne-only room pouring the biodynamic Leclerc Briant range, including Abyss and the prestige cuvees, by the glass
sparkling_rooms.tip: Taste the Leclerc Briant Abyss, aged under the sea, against the standard range to see the biodynamic house in full.
sparkling_rooms.description: A Champagne-only room on the Avenue de Champagne pouring the biodynamic Leclerc Briant range from the house's own bar.

sparkling_rooms.name: La Vinocave Champagne corner
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Champagne tasting corner of a long-running Reims cave, focused on small-domaine fizz with food pairings into the evening
sparkling_rooms.tip: Pull up at the Champagne corner and let the team pour small-domaine fizz with a cheese plate as the evening settles.
sparkling_rooms.description: The Champagne tasting corner of La Vinocave in Reims, pouring small-domaine bubbles with food pairings into the evening.

sparkling_rooms.name: Le Parvis prestige Champagne bar
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Champagne-only bar facing the cathedral pouring prestige and grower cuvees by the glass with truffle and caviar
sparkling_rooms.tip: Take a prestige-cuvee flight on the terrace as the cathedral lights up; the caviar service is the splurge pairing.
sparkling_rooms.description: The cathedral-facing prestige Champagne bar at Le Parvis, pouring grower and tete-de-cuvee bottles by the glass with luxury bites.

sparkling_rooms.name: Le Bocal oyster and Champagne bar
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Tiny counter pairing oysters and shellfish with Champagne by the glass behind a Boulingrin fishmonger
sparkling_rooms.tip: Squeeze in at the counter for oysters and a glass of Champagne; it is the freshest sparkling-and-shellfish match in Reims.
sparkling_rooms.description: Counter-only oyster and Champagne bar behind a Boulingrin fishmonger, matching shellfish to fizz by the glass.
